titleStmt.title: SII 20.4: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 4. (B.K. No. 37 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a slab built into the right wall of the Śaṁkha-basti at Basti-Baṇa.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 608, 5th regnal year of the king, Pausha, Paurṇimā.

It records the grant, by the king, of the village Haḍagile situated in Beḷuvala-300 for the repairs, worship and offerings to the God of Śaṅkha Jinālaya, and also for a dāna-śālā, at the request of Dhruvadēvāchārya of Mūla-saṅgha and Dēva-gaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīmatāṁ sakaḷabhuvanasaṁstūyamā
namānavyasagōtrāṇāṁ hārītiputrāṇāṁ saptalōkamātṛbhiḥ saptamātṛbhirabhivarddhitānāṁ kārttikēyaparirakṣaṇaprāptakalyāṇaparaṁparā
ṇāṁ bhagavannārāyaṇaprasādasamāsāditavarāhalāṁchanakṣaṇēkṣaṇavaśīkṛtāśēṣamahībhṛtāṁ caḷukyānāṁ kuḷamaḷaṅkariṣṇōraśvamēdhā
vabhṛtasnānapavitrīkritagātrasya śrīpolakēśivallabhamahārājasya sūnuḥ parākramākrāntavanavāsyādiparanṛpatimaṇḍaḷapraṇibaddhaviśu
ddhakīrttiḥ śrīkīrttivarmmaprithvīvallabhamahārājasya sūnuḥ samarasaṁsaktasakaḷōttarāpathēśvara śrīharṣavardhanaparājayōpalabdhaparamēśvarāparanāma
dhēyasya satyāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarasya priyatanayaḥ citra kaṇṭhākhyapravaraturaṁgamēṇaikēnaiva pratītānēkasaṁśri
tatrairājyakāṁcīpatibaḷamavaṣṭabhya karadīkṛtakēraḷapāraśīkasiṁhaḷādidvīpādhipasya sakaḷōttarāpathanāthamathanōṁpārjjitōrjjitapāḷidhvajā
disamastapāramaiśvaryyacihnanya vinayādityasatyāśrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvarabhaṭṭārakaḥ sarvvānēva
mājñāpayati viditamastu vōsmābhiḥ Aṣṭōttaraṣaṭyatēṣu śakavarṣēṣvatītēṣu pravarttamānavijayarājyapaṁcamasaṁvatsarē śrīraktapura
madhivasati vijayaskandhāvārē pauṣamāsapaurṇnimāsyāṁ śrimūlasaṁghānvaya dēvagaṇatiḷakadhruvadēvācāryyadharmmōpadēśātu(t) śrī
śaṁkhadēvatāpāvanakhaṇḍasphuṭitasaṁskāra kusumadēvabhōganimittaṁ dāna śālāpravarttanārthaṁ beḷuvalaśatatrayamadhyava
rtti haḍagilenāmagrāmaṁ sarvvabādhaparihāraṁ dattavān . tasya sīmā samākhyāyatē . pūrvvasyāndiśi kuraḍige grāmāt saiyyaḍi
grāma sthāna mārggātpaścimasyāṁ diśi śvētapāṣāṇaṁ pāvakadiśi śamī yi kriṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ ca[ṭ�grā] mataḥ kriṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ śvētapāṣāṇaṁ caturttha
taḥ kṛṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ tatpaścimataḥ kṛṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ taduttarataḥ kṛṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ tatpaścimataḥ kṛṣṇapāṣāṇaṁ taduttarataḥ śaṁkā
paści mukha yasrōtaḥ Īśānyāṁ diśi kṛṣṇapāṣāṇayugapūrvakandhārigulma pūrvōktasaiyaḍigrāmapathātpaścimataḥ pā
ṣāṇasaṁgatā sīmā . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
